prompt: A moody, soft-focus overhead portrait of a young woman standing in still green water, shot from directly above with her head bowed slightly toward the camera. She has pale platinum-blonde hair pulled back into a loose, slightly messy updo with wispy strands and a visible center part. Her face is obscured and not visible, creating an anonymous editorial feel. She wears a one-piece swimsuit with a deep scoop neckline, in muted olive green with contrasting burnt orange edging around the straps and neckline. Her shoulders and upper chest emerge above the waterline, with her arms descending straight down along her sides and the lower hands faintly visible near the bottom corners. Use a tight vertical composition centered on the torso and head, with the body symmetrical in frame against a uniform murky green background. Render it as a dreamy analog-fashion photograph with heavy blur, shallow detail, soft grain, low contrast, muted tones, subtle vignetting, and a nostalgic 35mm film look. The lighting is diffuse and overcast, with no hard shadows, emphasizing a melancholic, intimate, minimalist mood.
